Wed, Nov 5, 2025 · 6:00 PM to 9:00 PM CET

The Spot

Bottova 2/A · Bratislava-Staré Mesto

Bratislava dbt Meetup #6

Hosted by Geri P.

Bratislava dbt Meetup Group
4.8
27 reviews
Details

🤩 BRATISLAVA dbt MEETUP #6 is coming up with expert talks on the hottest topics in data & AI. Come along to learn, connect with peers, and expand your network.

At Volume 6, experts from Slido and Muziker will take the stage to share insights from practical experience and give you the guidance you need.

-- LINE-UP --

1️⃣ ENTERPRISE dbt AT SCALE: MULTI-COUNTRY E-COMMERCE DATA ARCHITECTURE WITH CLICKHOUSE
with Lukáš Kozelnický, Senior Data Engineer at Muziker

Lukáš will walk us through the production-grade dbt implementation that powers Muziker, Europe's leading musical instrument e-commerce platform operating across 30+ countries. He will explore the data warehouse that:

Handles complex multi-currency operations;
Integrates 50+ data sources;
Features sophisticated AI-powered inventory optimisation.

Let’s compare Muziker’s setup 4 years ago with their data platform today to see what has changed in the analytics world, how the new approach empowers the business, and how the data culture at the company has changed to support this shift.

2️⃣ WHAT IS PERSONALISATION WITHOUT DATA?
with Michaela Truchanová (Miši), Analytics Engineer at Slido

Using email personalisation tools is not enough. True impact comes when your efforts are powered by data that is always consistent and unified across systems.

In this session, Miši will show us how Slido leverages dbt models to drive engaging client communication while ensuring that data remains accurate and harmonised throughout all systems.

Event moderator: Dominik Simco, Talent & Community Expert, Infinite Lambda
________

-- THIS EVENT IS PERFECT FOR --

People across the entire spectrum of data roles and levels;
Tech folks who want to keep expanding their knowledge and networks;
Business leaders who want to see how data & AI technology powers modern enterprises;
All data & AI enthusiasts.

Join the data community, learn from experts, and expand your network.

-- ADMISSION --
Admission FREE, but seats are limited, so book yours by RSVP-ing Yes to this event.

-- SCHEDULE --
17:45 – 18:00: Check-in
18:00 – 18:05: Welcome
18:05 – 18:35: Talk #1 + Q&A
18:40 – 19:10: Talk #2 + Q&A
19:15 – 21:00: Networking & 🍕

-- WHEN & WHERE --
THE SPOT
Bottova 2/A, 811 09
Bratislava, Slovakia
https://maps.app.goo.gl/v26DZ64FoofSctgK9

Organised by: Infinite Lambda

---------
ABOUT dbt MEETUPS
dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, but you will catch presentations on broader topics, such as analytics, data stacks, DataOps, modelling, testing, and team experiences.

---------
ABOUT dbt Labs
dbt Labs is on a mission to help data practitioners create and disseminate organisational knowledge. dbt is the standard for AI-ready structured data. Powered by the dbt Fusion engine, it unlocks the performance, context, and trust that organisations need to scale analytics in the era of AI. Globally, more than 60,000 data teams use dbt, including those at Siemens, Roche and Condé Nast.

Learn more at getdbt.com, and follow dbt Labs on LinkedIn, Instagram, and YouTube.

---------
To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

Read more
Speaker
Lukáš Kozelnický (Muziker); Michaela Truchanová (Slido)

Michaela Truchanová (Miši), Analytics Engineer at Slido
Miši joined Slido six years ago, starting in the Marketing team, and moving on to explore various business areas and work with a wide range of technical solutions. With a background in both economics and information technology, she bridges business needs with technical know-how. Passionate for supporting other teams with analytics, accessible data, and automations. Miši turns complex data into practical insights and efficient processes.

Lukáš Kozelnický, Senior Data Engineer at Muziker
With more than 14 years in tech, Lukáš knows what it takes to build strong data foundations. At Muiker, he has spent the last 3 years leading data warehousing efforts from the ground up, shaping data architecture and transformation with tools like dbt, ClickHouse, and Airflow.

Wed, May 21, 2025 · 6:00 PM to 9:00 PM CEST

Apollo Business Center II, Block A

Prievozská 4, 82109 · Bratislava

Bratislava dbt Meetup #5

Hosted by Geri P.

Bratislava dbt Meetup Group
4.8
27 reviews
Details

🤩 BRATISLAVA dbt MEETUP #5 is coming up with expert talks on trending topics in data. Come along to hear the insights, connect with your data peers, and expand your network.

🔥 ABOUT THIS EVENT
At Vol. 5 of Bratislava dbt Meetup, we will be talking about transitioning into a role in data, leveraging AI in analytics, the latest in the modern data stack and much more.

Experts from Infinite Lambda, EMARK, and Slido will take the stage to share insights from practical experience and give you the guidance you need.

- - LINE-UP - -
PROJECT ADAM: HOW TO GET YOUR DATA CAREER STARTED
Viktória Horváth, Analytics Engineer @ Infinite Lambda

Join us for this unconventional case study to explore the real-world experience of starting a career in data, navigating the change, and finding a place that makes you happy.

From making the transition into data, to surviving the hiring process (+ best practices), this is a data-driven take on the realities of starting fresh in the data space.

Viki will share first-hand experience, giving you the tips to speed up the process and set yourself up for success. This talk promises no sugar-coating and a liberal amount of hard-earned lessons that will make your own ride less bumpy.

TAMING UNSTRUCTURED DATA WITH AI
Tomáš Janotík, Cloud Data Architect at EMARK

How do you get AI to see and collect data from images? You are asking the right person because Tomas has recently got it to do just that.

One of Tomas’s recent projects involved extracting data from supermarket images, such as products on shelves, brands, and price tags. Here, dbt was instrumental in processing the unstructured data effectively in the data warehouse.

The set-up included a directory table/stage in Snowflake, where images were uploaded, and an incremental dbt model was added on top of that to call an LLM function to extract the data from newly added files to a table.
This talk will showcase the key dbt features that make an AI-powered pipeline like this more effective. We will focus on incremental models, testing, jobs scheduling, and more.

MIGRATING A DBT PROJECT BETWEEN CLOUD DATASTORES
Tomas Sirny, Senior Data Architect at Slido

Switching from AWS Athena to Redshift is a hefty task that Slido’s data team have braved through and nearly completed. Senior Data Architect Tomas Sirny will take us through the approach, sharing best practices and tips that will help you avoid the pitfalls and accelerate your own project.

- - ADMISSION - -
The event is completely FREE, but seats are limited, so book yours by RSVP-ing.

- - SCHEDULE - -
17:45 – 18:00: Registration
18:00 – 18:10: Opening remarks
18:10 – 18:40: Talk #1 + Q&A
18:40 – 19:10: Talk #2 + Q&A
19:10 – 19:40: Talk #3 + Q&A
19:40 – 22:00: Networking and drinks

The event is perfect for:

People across the entire spectrum of data roles;
Data practitioners of any level;
Seasoned professionals who want to keep expanding their knowledge and networks.

📌
Wednesday, 21 May
Apollo Business Center II, Block A
Bratislava, Slovakia
https://maps.app.goo.gl/1FnxhToFix7cSgEj8

- - HOW TO GET THERE - -
The entrance to the building is from Turčianská Street.

Driving & parking:
Paid parking is available in the underground car park for €3/h. You will find the entrance to the underground garage on Prievozská Street, behind Block B of the Apollo BC II building.

Public transport:
From the Nivy Bus Station, take buses No. 42, 70, or 72 and alight at the Novohradská stop, which is just a few meters away from Block A of the Apollo Business Center II.

----------------------------------

dbt is the standard in data transformation, used by over 50,000 organizations worldwide. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust. Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

----------------------------------

To attend, please read:

The Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

----------------------------------

Join the data community, learn from experts, and expand your network.

Read more
Speaker
1. Viktória Horváth --- 2. Tomáš Janotík --- 3. Tomas Sirny

Viktória Horváth, Analytics Engineer @ Infinite Lambda
Viktória is a self-taught data specialist with a curious nature and a critical-thinking mindset. Her motivation is fuelled by a drive to continuously improve as a person and as a professional.

Viki always aims for the best possible outcome, thinks ahead, and tries to see the bigger picture.

Tomáš Janotík, Cloud Data Architect @ EMARK
Tomáš is a Cloud Data Architect at Emark Analytics. He holds degrees in Economics from the University of Amsterdam and Charles University of Prague, and has held numerous roles in data. His main focus now is on data modelling and modern cloud technologies.

Tomas loves travelling, board games and spending time with his children.

Tomas Sirny, Senior Data Architect @ Slido
Tomas Sirny is a Senior Data Architect, leading a data engineering team at Slido and managing the data warehouse. With over 15 years in tech, he has extensive experience across the full data warehouse lifecycle, utilising tools like Airflow, AWS, dbt, and Spark.

Tomas’s background includes experience with cloud data platforms, automation, and data science. His is proficient with the modern data stack and keen to share valuable insights from practical work.

Bratislava dbt Meetup Group

REGISTER HERE 👉 https://www.getdbt.com/resources/webinars/community-slack-ama

🚀 Hey Community! Are you ready to dive deep, get insights, and satisfy your curiosity?

We’re hosting monthly live Ask Me Anything events! It's the perfect platform to quench your curiosity and get to know each other better. Don't miss out on this opportunity to connect and learn together.

What to Expect:

Discussing trends in the analytics space
Sharing key takeaways from the recent events
Hearing your questions and thoughts

Speaker: Erica Louie, Data @ dbt Labs
Host: Bolaji Oyejide, Digital Community Mgr @ dbt Labs
Topic: Careers in data, building a data team, the dbt Semantic Layer, and scaling your dbt project
When: November 21st @ 2pm EST
Where: Virtual and in #dbt-community-merge

Erica was the second employee at dbt Labs, then called Fishtown Analytics and she's seen dbt grow, a lot. In this AMA, Erica will share more on her career in data, her strong opinions on building a data team, how she manages her team, the dbt Semantic Layer, scaling your dbt project, and more on her Substack.

Register now to get the link to watch and join the #dbt-community-ama channel in Slack to participate live!

Read more
Speaker
Erica Louie, dbt Labs

Second hire at dbt Labs, former Head of Data, and now leading the product data team (and previously worked for BuzzFeed's data team), Erica "ric" Louie proudly hails from a liberal arts background (studied political science + italian) and grew her career in data at dbt Labs starting from the ground-up. She firmly believes that anyone can be a data practitioner with the right mentors, resources (sans trivial data jargon), and a good sense of humor. While rethinking the philosophy behind data systems, operations, and teams is one of her favorite topics, she enjoys thinking and writing about the human experience, and how it intersects with the work we choose to do and who we choose to do it with.

🤩 BRATISLAVA dbt MEETUP VOL. 4 is coming up with a Coalesce watch party + expert panel discussions on hot topics from the data industry.

Join the data community, learn from experts and expand your network.

🔥 ABOUT THIS EVENT
At Volume 4, we will be watching select talks from Coalesce, one of the largest conferences in the data world. Experts from Infinite Lambda, EMARK, and Slido will take the stage for live panel discussions on-site to share their take and insights.

This edition’s topics:

Don't panic: What to do when your data breaks (video talk) + Managing data incidents (live panel discussion)
Semantic layers (video talk) + Semantic layers beyond the hype (live panel discussion)

- - THE EXPERTS - -
Daniela Karasova, Analytics Engineering Lead at Slido — panelist
Tomas Janotik, Cloud Data Architect at EMARK — panelist
Gergely Földi, Analytics Tech Lead at Infinite Lambda — panelist
Mimi Křížková, Head of Data Analytics Engineering at Slido — moderator

- - SCHEDULE - -
17:45 – 18:00: Registration
18:00 – 18:10: Opening remarks
18:10 – 18:40: Video talk #1: Don't panic: What to do when your data breaks
18:40 – 19:10: Live expert panel #1 + Q&A: Managing data incidents
19:10 – 19:40: Video talk #2: Semantic layers
19:40 – 20:10: Live expert panel #2 + Q&A: Semantic layers beyond the hype
20:10 – 21:30 Networking and drinks

- - ADMISSION - -
The event is FREE but seats are limited, so book yours by RSVP-ing.

- - WHEN & WHERE - -
Wednesday, 20 November
6 pm

HB Reavis Twin City C, Medium Event Space
Mlynské nivy 7816/14,
821 09 Bratislava, Slovakia
https://maps.app.goo.gl/zDhHB4HLHBWmbYPF8

This meetup is perfect for you if you are:
— A data professional (any level, any role, you’ll benefit from the event);
— A data, AI or tech enthusiast;
— Looking to expand your knowledge in data, analytics, ML/AI technology;
— Keen to build valuable connections in the industry and learn about opportunities.

----------------------------------
Please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

----------------------------------
➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/
🤝 For the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-czsk channel in dbt Slack (https://slack.getdbt.com/).

----------------------------------
dbt is the standard in data transformation, used by over 40,000 organizations worldwide. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust. Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

Read more
Speaker
Tomas Janotik (EMARK), Gergely Földi (Infinite Lambda), Daniela Karasova (Slido)

Daniela is an analytics engineering lead at Slido. She joined the data team as a data analyst, transitioned to analytics and grew into a lead role. Daniela's role is to make data accessible to everyone in the company so that they can make data-enabled decisions. She aims to democratise data at Slido and educates the wider team on how to use data and create their own reports to draw meaningful insights.

Tomas is a Cloud Data Architect at Emark Analytics. He holds degrees in Economics from the University of Amsterdam and Charles University of Prague and has held numerous roles in data. His main focus now is on data modelling and modern cloud technologies.
Tomas loves travelling, board games and spending time with his children.

Gergely has over 7 years of professional experience with various technologies and clients globally. He is involved in end-to-end data platform projects, from conceptual design workshops to deployment and validation.
Gergely firmly believes that users come first and that team effort wins over individualism, so he is continuously seeking to enrich his engineering mindset with UX and leadership skills.

Mimi is Head of Data Analytics at Slido. She believes in the value of sharing knowledge from experience and is passionate about empowering the data community to exchange insights. Mimi is joining the meetup as a panel moderator and will make sure we have a productive and enjoyable discussion.

Bratislava dbt Meetup #3

Hosted by Bratislava dbt Meetup Group

Bratislava dbt Meetup Group
4.8
27 reviews
Details

🤩 BRATISLAVA dbt MEETUP VOL. 3 is coming your way.
Join the data community, learn from experts and expand your network. See you there, okay?

🔥 ABOUT THIS EVENT
At Volume 3, we will be focusing on boosting performance in the modern data stack through efficient approaches to development, deployment and ML.

Presentations will be delivered in English.

- - TOPICS & SPEAKERS --
1️⃣ Blue/Green Deployments: How to Play and Win the Release Game
Speaker: Milan Spal, Analytics Engineer at Infinite Lambda

Milan is going to take us through a robust approach to releases. He is going to show us how to apply a blue/green deployment strategy to increase application availability and reduce deployment risk by simplifying the rollback process if a deployment fails.

2️⃣ Leveraging dbt Tooling to Speed up Development and Deployment
Speaker: Daniela Barokova, Analytics Engineer at Slido

Daniela is going to show us how to utilise dbt tooling and a Slim CI methodology to streamline data transformation and deployment pipelines. She is going to share insights on maximising workflow efficiency, optimising costs and saving time during the development cycle.

3️⃣ Level up the modern data stack with dbt and DuckDB kit
Speakers: Jozef Regináč (director of data science engineering) and Pavel Ježek (data engineer) at STRV

Jozef and Pavel faced an interesting challenge related to running ML Python scripts inside their data stack. In this presentation, they are going to show us how they tackled it through the powerful combination of dbt and DuckDB. Join us to see their simple, elegant and cost-efficient solution.

🌟 Moderator: Tomas Janotik, analytics engineer at Infinite Lambda
Tomas’s main focus is on data modelling and modern cloud technologies. He is going to facilitate a productive discussion on various aspects of the modern data stack.

- - ADMISSION - -
The event is completely FREE but seats are limited, so book yours by RSVP-ing.

- - SCHEDULE - -
17:45 – 18:00: Registration
18:00 – 18:10: Opening remarks
18:10 – 18:40: Talk #1 + Q&A
18:40 – 19:10: Talk #2 + Q&A
19:10 – 19:40: Talk #3 + Q&A
19:40 – 22:00: Networking and drinks

The event is suitable for:

People across the entire spectrum of data roles;
Data practitioners of any level;
Seasoned professionals who want to keep expanding their knowledge and networks.

To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

To attend, please read the Required Participation Language for In-Person Events with dbt Labs: https://bit.ly/3QIJXFb
➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/
🤝 For the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-czsk channel in dbt Slack (https://slack.getdbt.com/).

----------------------------------

dbt is a data transformation framework that lets analysts and engineers collaborate using their shared knowledge of SQL. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organisation can trust.
Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

Read more
Speaker
Milan Spal, Daniela Barokova, Jozef Regináč, Pavel Ježek, Tomas Janotik

Milan has extensive experience with the modern data stack. In his analytics engineering role, he practises his superpower of turning complex data into strategic insights through data analysis, modelling and visualisation. Outside of work, Milan prioritises time with his family, savours a good cup of coffee and prioritises an active lifestyle.

Daniela grew with Slido’s data team, transitioning from a data analyst to an analytics engineer’s role. A few months ago, she came back from maternity leave. Since then, her main focus has been on internal projects, particularly those centred around enhancing data quality and efficiency.

Jozef was the first data engineer at STRV. Once a long-time data analyst, he felt he had had enough and moved on to analytics engineer thanks to dbt. Jozef likes good filter coffee, open-source projects and filmography.

Pavel is a seasoned data engineer with a passion for crafting neat, efficient data solutions. As a strong advocate for simplicity and performance, he leverages his extensive dbt expertise and is joining us to share insights on dbt and data pipelines.

Tomas is a senior analytics engineer at Infinite Lambda. He studied Economics at the University of Amsterdam and Charles University in Prague and has held numerous roles in data. His main focus now is on data modelling and modern cloud technologies. Tomas loves travelling, board games and spending time with his children.

Thu, Nov 23, 2023 · 6:00 PM to 9:00 PM CET

HubHub Twin City C

Mlynské nivy 16 · Bratislava-Staré Mesto

Bratislava dbt Meetup #2

Hosted by Bratislava dbt Meetup Group

Bratislava dbt Meetup Group
4.8
27 reviews
Details

🤩 BRATISLAVA dbt MEETUP VOL. 2 is coming your way.
Join the data community, learn from experts and expand your network. See you there, okay?

🔥 ABOUT THIS EVENT
At this second edition, you will catch talks across the whole spectrum of the modern data experience: from getting started the MDS through data testing to changing careers and entering the fabulous world of analytics.

Presentations will be delivered in English.

- - TOPICS & SPEAKERS --
1️⃣ Modern Data Stack vs Modern Data People
Speaker: Viktoria Horvath, Analytics Engineer @ Infinite Lambda

Viki often helps data teams get started with dbt and the Modern Data Stack. In this talk, she will look into the most common challenges that people face but often do not voice. Join this session to get answers to the burning questions that are sure to come up while working on your first dbt project or having just started a new role in analytics. Viki will share insights, show you how to seek support and point you to valuable resources to set you up for success.

2️⃣ Fighting the Fear of Change: My Shift from a Marketer to an Analytics Engineer
Speaker: Alina Serhiienko, Analytics Engineer @ Slido

Alina had extensive experience in marketing she intended to keep building on. Yet, upon moving to Slovakia and starting her dream career at Slido in 2022, she discovered she was too passionate for data not to pursue a career in the field. She made a transition and is now a member of Slido’s analytics team. Alina will be sharing her story, shedding light on how modern tools such as dbt facilitate such a career change and make it easier for folks to enter the data industry.

3️⃣ How dbt Helps You Sleep at Night (Part 2)
Speaker: Sean McIntyre, Senior Solutions Architect @ dbt Labs

The delivery of high quality data is vital for organisations for making both day-to-day and strategic decisions. Sean is going to explore data testing techniques, comment on various strategies and show you how to leverage dbt's testing capabilities to ensure data quality.

🌟 Moderator
Miriama Krizkova, Head of Analytics Engineering @ Slido

- - ADMISSION - -
The event is completely FREE but seats are limited, so book yours by RSVP-ing.

- - SCHEDULE - -
17:45 – 18:00: Registration
18:00 – 18:10: Opening remarks
18:10 – 18:40: Talk #1 + Q&A
18:40 – 19:10: Talk #2 + Q&A
19:10 – 19:40: Talk #3 + Q&A
19:40 – 22:00: Networking and drinks

The event is suitable for:
Folks just starting out on their data journey;
People with some experience with the modern data stack;
Seasoned professionals who want to keep expanding their knowledge.
🚀 See you soon, data buddies.

----------------------------------

To attend, please read the Required Participation Language for In-Person Events with dbt Labs: https://bit.ly/3QIJXFb
➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/
🤝 For the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-czsk channel in dbt Slack (https://slack.getdbt.com/).

----------------------------------

dbt is a data transformation framework that lets analysts and engineers collaborate using their shared knowledge of SQL. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organisation can trust.
Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

Read more
Speaker
Viktoria Horvath, Alina Serhiienko and Sean McIntyre

Viktoria is a self-taught data specialist with a curious nature and a critical thinking mindset. Her motivation is fuelled by her drive to continuously improve as a person and as a professional. Viktoria always aims for the best possible outcome, thinks ahead and tries to see the bigger picture.

----------------------------------

Alina is a passionate Data Analyst with expertise in SQL, Python (currently learning), and various relational databases. Developing ETL pipelines and creating impactful visualisations are two of her areas of expertise. She is keen on sharing her knowledge and insights with the community to help others dive into the world of data. Before delving into analytics, Alina had gained over 10 years of experience in marketing in Ukraine.

----------------------------------

Sean is a Senior Solutions Architect at dbt Labs who works with organisations across Europe, helping them get started with and scaling dbt Cloud. In his last role, he was a Principal Data Engineer who implemented the modern data stack. Originally from Canada, his homebase is now just down the Danube in Vienna but he will be joining us at Bratislava dbt Meetup this November.

How to find us
Bratislava dbt Meetup #1

Hosted by Bratislava dbt Meetup Group

Bratislava dbt Meetup Group
4.8
27 reviews
Details

🤩 dbt MEETUP IS COMING TO BRATISLAVA.
Join the data community, learn from experts and expand your network. See you there, okay?

🔥 ABOUT THIS EVENT
At the very first edition, you will catch talks* about how dbt helps professionals streamline their organisation’s data journey, enable data scaling and ensure data quality.

*The presentations will be delivered in Slovak/Czech.

🗓️ WHEN & WHERE
22 June, 17:45
The Spot
Floor 6
Bottova 2/A, 811 09 Bratislava, Slovakia

🎤 3 EXPERT SPEAKERS WITH EXCITING TOPICS

1️⃣ “What on Earth is dbt?”
Radek Tomsej, Head of Data Engineering, Alma Career

Too many people in the data world are still wondering what on Earth dbt is and why everyone else is talking about it. Radek is lifting the curtain around dbt’s seemingly magical capabilities to transform a humble data analyst into a fully fledged data developer (or an analyst that’s no longer that humble).
Radek’s presentation is sprinkled with a liberal amount of jokes at the expense of our beloved SQL, so keep that in mind if you are particularly partial to it.

2️⃣ “dbt: Unleashing the Data Fever”
Michal Kolacek, Head of Analytics Engineering, Slido
Let's dive into the world of dbt, a transformative tool that fosters a data-passionate culture within your team. Michal is going to share real-life stories from Slido’s data journey, illustrating how dbt has streamlined operations, empowered everyone with data, and amplified our decision-making capabilities. This talk is all about how dbt can make your life a whole lot easier and spark enthusiasm for data everywhere you look.

3️⃣ “How dbt helps you sleep at night”
Tomas Janotik, Senior Analytics Engineer, Infinite Lambda
Testing and monitoring data quality are two of the greatest challenges in data modelling. dbt helps you identify and address issues as early as possible, giving millions of modellers peace of mind.

In his talk, Tomas is going to show you:

How data quality testing works in dbt;
What types of tests are available in dbt and how to implement them;
How testing can build data trust and reliability within your organisation;
How dbt enables you to easily create detailed documentation of your data models and tests.

🌟 Moderator
Viktoria Karolova (Viki), Chief of Staff to CTO or that-one-non-engineer-in-engineering as she prefers to say
Viki completed her graduate studies in the UK and went on to spend a year with an e-commerce start up in Thailand, which sparked her interest in tech and the startup world. Currently, she is a Chief of Staff to CTO at Slido, where she is focusing on enabling engineering teams by removing inefficiencies, facilitating discussion and bringing a lot of energy.

✅ SCHEDULE
17:45 – 18:00: Registration
18:00 – 18:10: Opening remarks
18:10 – 18:40: Talk #1 + Q&A
18:40 – 19:10: Talk #2 + Q&A
19:10 – 19:40: Talk #3 + Q&A
19:40 – 19:50: Quiz
19:50 – 22:00: Networking

The event is suitable for:

Folks just starting out on their data journey;
People with some experience with the modern data stack;
Seasoned professionals who want to keep expanding their knowledge.

🚀 See you soon, data buddies.

To attend, please read the Required Participation Language for In-Person Events with dbt Labs: https://bit.ly/3QIJXFb

🤝For the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-czsk channel in dbt Slack (https://slack.getdbt.com/).
----------------------------------
dbt is a data transformation framework that lets analysts and engineers collaborate using their shared knowledge of SQL. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust.
Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

Read more
Speaker
Viki Karolova, Michal Kolacek, Radek Tomsej, Tomas Janotik

Viki completed her graduate studies in the UK and went on to spend a year with an e-commerce start up in Thailand, which sparked her interest in tech and the startup world. Currently, she is a Chief of Staff to CTO at Slido, where she is focusing on enabling engineering teams by removing inefficiencies, facilitating discussion and bringing a lot of energy.

Michal is passionate about all things data: from collection and processing, through analytics and visualisation, to automation and impact on society. At Slido, he empowers the team with clean data and the knowledge on how to use it effectively. Whenever possible, he loves to share his expertise through mentoring, teaching or contributing to community projects.

Radek is head of data engineering at Alma Career, where they are empowering better recruitment experiences. He is a proud father, an open-source contributor and a guardian of data accuracy and Slack emojis. Ask him anything, and he'll respond with a pivot table.

Tomas is a senior analytics engineer at Infinite Lambda. He studied Economics at theUniversity of Amsterdam and Charles University in Prague and has held numerous roles in data. His main focus now is on data modelling and modern cloud technologies. Tomas loves travelling, board games and spending time with his children.
